The '''Gk3 Cryocooler''' was an advanced [[Cooling unit/Legends|cooling unit]]. These unit was installed in [[Eksoan/Legends|Eksoan's]] [[Class-4T3 power generator/Legends|Class-4T3 power generator]] which provided power to the [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]]. The Gk3 Cryocooler was intended to prevent overheating in the [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] and to reduce the likelihood of an explosive overload. To assist the Gk3 Cryocooler, a second crew member oversaw and regulated the power flow from the Class-4T3 while the E-Web was in operation.<ref name="EGWT" />
